metadata.name: ext_epi
metadata.description: External Position Integration for GLAM Protocol

instructions.name: refresh_priced_protocol
docs: Republish the aggregate EPI priced protocol from already validated
observations at the current slot.

instructions.name: remove_external_position
docs: Remove an external position from the registry.
Closes the observation state PDA and refunds rent to the signer.

instructions.name: submit_external_observation
docs: Submit an observation for a configured external position.
Writes to pending slot; replaces any existing pending observation.

instructions.name: upsert_external_position
docs: Create or update an external position configuration.
Creates the observation state PDA on first call for a position.

instructions.name: validate_external_observation
docs: Validate a pending observation, promote to active, and publish
the full aggregate priced protocol for ext_epi.
All position observations are stored in the single observation state PDA,
so no remaining_accounts are needed.

types.name: Denomination
docs: Denomination of an observation amount.
Never reorder existing variants — append only.

types.name: DenominationSpec
docs: Full denomination spec: the discriminant plus an optional mint pubkey.

fields.name: mint
docs: Only meaningful when `denom == Denomination::Mint`.
Set to `Pubkey::default()` for `Usd`.

types.name: ExternalPositionConfig
docs: Per-position configuration entry in the registry.

fields.name: position_id
docs: Unique identifier for this position within the vault.
Under the cleaner pricing model, this 32-byte id is also the canonical
coverage key published into `glam_state.external_positions` and
`PricedProtocol.positions`. For bridge-managed inflight transfers, this
should be the transfer-record pubkey bytes.

fields.name: position_type
docs: Type of position (Valued or Tokenized).

fields.name: source_type
docs: Source type (Trusted or Native).

fields.name: denomination
docs: Denomination rules for Trusted positions.
For Native positions this is ignored (denomination derived from custody).

fields.name: native_custody_account
docs: Custody account for Native positions. `Pubkey::default()` for Trusted.

fields.name: native_custody_kind
docs: Custody kind for Native positions.

fields.name: enabled
docs: Whether this position is enabled for observations.

fields.name: freshness_override_secs
docs: Freshness override in seconds. 0 means use vault default.

fields.name: submit_allowlist
docs: Per-position submit allowlist. Empty vec = use role-based access only.

fields.name: validate_allowlist
docs: Per-position validate allowlist. Empty vec = use role-based access only.

fields.name: configure_allowlist
docs: Per-position configure allowlist. Empty vec = use role-based access only.
This is intentionally more permissive than the protocol-wide asset
allowlist semantics where an empty allowlist means deny all.

types.name: ExternalPositionType
docs: Type of external position.
Never reorder existing variants — append only.

types.name: ExternalSourceType
docs: Source of observation data.
Never reorder existing variants — append only.

types.name: IntegrationAcl
docs: An integration program can have multiple protocols supported.
Enabled protocols are stored in a bitmask, and each protocol can have its own policy.

types.name: IntegrationPermissions
docs: Stores delegate permissions for an integration program.

types.name: NativeCustodyKind
docs: Custody kind for Native source positions.
Never reorder existing variants — append only.

types.name: Observation
docs: A single observation snapshot.

fields.name: amount
docs: Signed amount in the observation's denomination.

fields.name: denomination
docs: Denomination of the amount.

fields.name: _pad_denom
docs: Alignment padding after denomination (to 8-byte boundary for i64).

fields.name: observation_timestamp
docs: Unix timestamp of the observation.

fields.name: external_shares
docs: External share count (for Tokenized positions).

fields.name: submitted_by
docs: Signer who submitted this observation.

fields.name: submitted_at_slot
docs: Slot at which this observation was submitted.

types.name: ObservationState
docs: Single PDA per vault that tracks all external position observations.
Seeds: [SEED_OBSERVATION_STATE, glam_state.key()]

fields.name: glam_state
docs: The glam_state this observation state belongs to.

fields.name: bump
docs: PDA bump.

fields.name: positions_len
docs: Number of active positions stored in `positions`.

fields.name: positions
docs: Per-position observation entries.

types.name: OracleConfigs
docs: Vault-specific oracle configs. If available, these configs are preferred over the global config.

types.name: PositionObservation
docs: Observation data for a single position, stored inline in `ObservationState`.

fields.name: position_id
docs: The position_id this entry tracks.

fields.name: has_pending
docs: Whether a pending observation exists.

fields.name: _pad_pending
docs: Alignment padding after has_pending (to 8-byte boundary for Observation).

fields.name: pending_observation
docs: The pending observation (only valid when `has_pending == true`).

fields.name: has_validated
docs: Whether a validated observation exists.

fields.name: _pad_validated
docs: Alignment padding after has_validated (to 8-byte boundary for Observation).

fields.name: last_validated_observation
docs: The last validated observation (only valid when `has_validated == true`).

fields.name: validated_by
docs: Signer who last validated.

fields.name: validated_at_slot
docs: Slot at which last validation occurred.

fields.name: validated_base_asset_amount
docs: Base-asset-normalized amount from the last validated observation.
This is the value that contributes to the aggregate priced protocol.

types.name: PositionObservationInput
docs: Observation data submitted by a caller.

fields.name: position_id
docs: The position being observed, identified by position_id.
The same 32-byte id is used as the canonical AUM coverage key.

fields.name: amount
docs: Signed amount in the position's denomination.
Positive = asset, negative = liability.

fields.name: denomination
docs: Denomination of the amount.

fields.name: observation_timestamp
docs: Unix timestamp of the observation.

fields.name: external_shares
docs: External share count (required > 0 for Tokenized positions, 0 for Valued).

fields.name: reserved
docs: Reserved for future use.

types.name: ProtocolPermissions
docs: Represents a delegate's permissions for a specific protocol

types.name: ProtocolPolicy
docs: Stores policy data for an integrated protocol.
Integration programs serialize/deserialize this data.

types.name: StoredI128
docs: Byte-backed i128 storage that keeps the containing zero-copy account 8-byte aligned.
